subject: A massive horned humanoid horror with elongated multi-jointed clawed arms reaching forward, glowing teal eyes, and weapons embedded in its body, looming amid a stormy sky
description: A towering, weathered horror dominates the frame, lit from within by a sickly teal-green glow that pulses through cracks in its hide and burns in its eyes. The creature has curling horns, a heavy gnarled skull-like face, and impossibly long spidery arms tipped with hooked black claws that splay outward toward the viewer. A large polearm or greatsword shaft is driven through its torso, with a second smaller blade stuck nearby — both weapons left behind by victims who failed to kill it. The background is a churning bank of grey-green storm clouds, lanced with the same teal energy that animates the figure. The composition pushes the horror forward and upward, looming, while keeping the body half-dissolved into the murk. Palette is bruised greys, deep blacks, and toxic cyan-green highlights.
foreground: horned horror with elongated clawed arms and embedded weapons in its torso
background: churning stormcloud sky shot through with teal lightning-like energy
emotion: implacable menace; the creature radiates relentless aggression and indestructibility
